summary: 22 tests passed, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: Section 6: 5 evaluation criteria; all names are valid Python identifiers (no hyphens); weights sum to 100%
completion_promises.evidence: Section 6 contains exactly 5 criteria: socratic_approach (25%), ao_accuracy (25%), mark_scheme_aligned (20%), age_appropriate (15%), factual_accuracy (15%). All names use underscores (valid Python identifiers). Weights sum to 100%. Verified by tests: test_section_6_has_exactly_5_criteria, test_all_criterion_names_are_valid_python_identifiers, test_weights_sum_to_100_percent, test_expected_criteria_present.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Section 6: Each criterion has a description and a weight column
completion_promises.evidence: All 5 criteria have non-empty Description and Weight columns in the markdown table. Verified by test_each_criterion_has_description_and_weight.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Section 7: Contains valid JSON code block with messages and metadata top-level keys
completion_promises.evidence: Section 7 contains a valid JSON code block with ShareGPT format. The JSON object has 'messages' (array with system/user/assistant roles) and 'metadata' (object with layer, type, ao, text, topic, grade_target, source, turns). Verified by tests: test_contains_valid_json_code_block, test_json_has_messages_key, test_json_has_metadata_key, test_messages_is_array, test_metadata_is_object.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Section 8: All fields have Required = yes
completion_promises.evidence: All 8 metadata fields (layer, type, ao, text, topic, grade_target, source, turns) have Required = 'yes'. Verified by test_all_fields_required_yes.

completion_promises.evidence: text field valid values include all 8 AQA set text identifiers: macbeth, a_christmas_carol, an_inspector_calls, power_conflict_poetry, language_paper_1, language_paper_2, general, unseen_poetry. Verified by test_text_valid_values_include_all_aqa_set_texts.

completion_promises.evidence: ao field valid values are exactly AO1, AO2, AO3, AO4, AO5, AO6 (with note 'can be empty'). No AO7+ values present. Verified by test_ao_valid_values_are_ao1_through_ao6_only.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Section 8: grade_target valid values are 4-9 and null
completion_promises.evidence: grade_target field valid values are '4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, null'. No grades outside 4-9 (verified no 1, 2, 3, or 10). Verified by test_grade_target_valid_values_are_4_to_9_and_null.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Section 9: Contains behaviour and knowledge rows with destinations
